session.client_groups: All commercial lending segments: BizBanking, MidCap, Corporate

metadata.purpose: Disbursement of approved loan amounts or credit facilities to clients
metadata.trigger: Loan or facility fully approved with all conditions precedent satisfied
metadata.scope: All commercial lending segments: BizBanking, MidCap, Corporate
metadata.process_variants: None — same process applies across all segments

process_steps.name: Receive and Log Release Request
process_steps.description: Receive release request from RM via email or LoanIQ. Log request in Operations tracking spreadsheet. Assign reference number. Acknowledge receipt to RM within 30 minutes.
process_steps.output: Logged release request with reference number

process_steps.name: Validate Conditions Precedent
process_steps.description: Open CP checklist in DMS. Verify all items marked Complete. Cross-check against LoanIQ facility record. If any CP incomplete, reject back to RM with details.
process_steps.escalation: If CP status unclear, escalate to Credit Administration

process_steps.name: Perform KYC and Sanctions Check
process_steps.description: Verify client KYC is current (within 12 months). Run sanctions screening on beneficiary. Document clearance in compliance log.
process_steps.source: DTP only - not in process map

process_steps.name: Verify Beneficiary Account Details
process_steps.description: Match beneficiary account to facility agreement. Verify account is active and not frozen. Obtain second verification from Senior Operations Officer.

process_steps.name: Create Payment Instruction
process_steps.description: Create MT103 or local payment instruction in Treasury Workstation. Enter amount, value date, beneficiary details. Attach supporting documentation.

process_steps.name: Authorize Payment (First Approval)
process_steps.description: Review payment details against source documents. Verify amount matches approved facility. Apply first authorization signature.
process_steps.source: DTP - process map shows single dual auth step

process_steps.name: Authorize Payment (Second Approval)
process_steps.description: Independent review of payment instruction. Apply second authorization signature. Release for execution. Maker-checker must be different individuals with no reporting relationship.
process_steps.source: DTP - process map shows single dual auth step

process_steps.name: Execute Payment
process_steps.description: Transmit payment instruction via SWIFT Alliance or RTGS. Monitor for acknowledgment. Capture payment reference.
process_steps.sla: Execute within 1 hour of final authorization

process_steps.name: Update Loan System
process_steps.description: Record drawdown in LoanIQ. Update facility utilization. Generate drawdown confirmation.

process_steps.name: Notify Client
process_steps.description: Send payment confirmation to client. Include payment reference and value date. Copy Operations for records.
process_steps.sla: Notify within 2 hours of payment execution

process_exceptions.title: Incomplete Conditions Precedent
process_exceptions.trigger: One or more CPs not marked complete in DMS
process_exceptions.handling: Reject back to RM with details of missing items

process_exceptions.title: Unclear CP Status
process_exceptions.trigger: CP status cannot be determined from available documentation

pain_points.title: Manual CP checking across multiple systems
pain_points.root_cause: No integration between LoanIQ and DMS for CP status

pain_points.title: Manual data entry from LoanIQ to Treasury Workstation
No real-time payment status visibility for RMs
pain_points.root_cause: Systems not integrated for status updates

pain_points.title: Manual request logging in Excel spreadsheet
pain_points.root_cause: No integrated request tracking in LoanIQ

controls.title: Four-eyes verification on beneficiary details
controls.description: Two officers verify account details - Operations Officer and Senior Operations Officer

controls.title: Dual authorization on payments
controls.description: Two signatures required. Maker-checker must be different individuals with no reporting relationship.

controls.title: Conditions precedent 100% complete
controls.description: All conditions precedent must be marked complete before release can proceed

controls.title: KYC currency check
controls.description: Client KYC must be current (within 12 months) before funds can be released

controls.title: Sanctions screening
controls.description: All beneficiaries must be screened against sanctions lists before payment
controls.source: DTP only - not in process map

systems.name: LoanIQ
systems.purpose: Loan management - release requests, facility records, outstanding balances

systems.name: DMS
systems.purpose: Document Management System for conditions precedent checklist

discrepancies.description: Scope conflict: Process map states 'All segments', DTP states 'BizBanking and MidCap only'. RESOLVED: Confirmed as 'All commercial lending segments: BizBanking, MidCap, Corporate'. DTP is outdated — Corporate was added subsequently.
Performer conflict at PS-FRL-001: Process map says 'Relationship Manager', DTP says 'Operations Clerk'
System conflict: Process map references 'Payment Gateway', DTP references 'Treasury Workstation' for payment creation
Missing step: DTP includes 'KYC and Sanctions Check' (PS-FRL-003) as separate Compliance step not shown in process map
Step granularity: Process map shows single 'Dual Authorization' step, DTP splits into two steps (First Approval, Second Approval)
SLA conflict: Process map states '2pm cut-off', DTP states '1:00 PM cut-off' for same-day release
Performer conflict at PS-FRL-010 (Client Notification): Process map says 'Operations', DTP says 'Relationship Manager'
